license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.56rg9d6
title: UC Davis - Immunohistochemistry BODIPY
author: Jennifer Rutkowsky

steps_raw.instruction: Frozen tissue sections (10µM) on slides (tissues embedded in OCT) are then fixed in 4% paraformaldehyde for 5 minutes. a. Alternatively paraffin embedded sections are deparaffinized through 3 100% xylene 3 min wash b. Sections were rehydrated through 100%, 95%, 70%, 50%, and 30% then into deionized water (3min each). c. Antigens are unmasked by steaming in Sodium citrate for 10 min.
Wash three times for ten minute in PBS
The sections where then incubated in 0.1mg/ml BODIPY® 492/515 in DMSO for 30 minutes in the dark.
Wash three times for ten minute in PBS
Coverslip mounted with Prolong gold antifade reagent with 4',6-diamidino-2-phenylindole (DAPI).
